recommendations.title: 4 Months, 3 Weeks and 2 Days
recommendations.overview: Two college roommates have 24 hours to make the ultimate choice as they finalize arrangements for a black market abortion.

recommendations.title: Graduation
recommendations.overview: After his daughter is assaulted and left with an injury that may jeopardize her opportunity to study in the UK, a Romanian doctor decides to do whatever it takes to secure her future.

recommendations.title: R.M.N.
recommendations.overview: A few days before Christmas, having quit his job in Germany, Matthias returns to his Transylvanian village. He wishes to involve himself more in the education of his son, Rudi, left for too long in the care of his mother, Ana, and to rid him of the u

recommendations.title: The Shack
recommendations.overview: A grieving man receives a mysterious, personal invitation to meet with God at a place called 'The Shack'.

recommendations.title: Silent Light
recommendations.overview: Johan and his family are Mennonites from the north of Mexico. Against the law of God and Man, Johan falls in love with another woman.

recommendations.title: Hotarubi no Mori e
recommendations.overview: One hot summer day a little girl gets lost in an enchanted forest of the mountain god where spirits reside. A young boy appears before her, but she cannot touch him for fear of making him disappear. And so a wondrous adventure awaits...

recommendations.title: Forever My Girl
recommendations.overview: After being gone for a decade, a country star returns home to the love he left behind.

recommendations.title: Never Look Away
recommendations.overview: German artist Kurt Barnert has escaped East Germany and now lives in West Germany, but is tormented by his childhood under the Nazis and the GDR regime.

recommendations.title: I Believe
recommendations.overview: A 9 year old boy experiences God's power in a supernatural way.

recommendations.title: OMG: Oh My God!
recommendations.overview: A shopkeeper takes God to court when his shop is destroyed by an earthquake.
